results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Topological analysis of attention matrices for uncertainty estimation IS the topological-invariant attention-head defect detection mechanism.
Dynamic sparse attention with cross-head attention for defect detection IS the multi-head attention-pattern defect detection paradigm.
Deformable attention DETR for defect inspection covers attention-based defect detection paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Geometric NN learning knot topology + local-writhe IS the crossing-number topological invariant J(pattern) computation.
Learning topological invariance NN predicting knot invariants IS the J(pattern) invariant learning paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Transformer with cross-attention for knot classification IS the knot-type catalog reclassification via Transformer.
NN knot invariants + persistent-homology decision-boundary analysis IS the topological-invariant attention-defect detection.
EXACT TWIN — Surgical per-head defect identification + per-head repair projection IS the deviation defect detection + repair projection mechanism in MAEDEUP-INVARIANT.
